name: How do I file a workers comp claim for lung issues from work dust in Boise?

mainEntity.name: How do I file a workers comp claim for lung issues from work dust in Boise?

acceptedAnswer.text: Notify employer in writing, get medical proof of work link, submit claim form to state commission.
acceptedAnswer.description:
**Notify your employer in writing within the state deadline, then submit a formal claim form.**

Idaho workers' comp covers occupational diseases like respiratory exposure if linked to work[2]. Provide exposure details, medical records proving causation[3][8].

- Get doctor diagnosis stating work connection.
- Gather MSDS sheets, coworker statements.
- File with Idaho Industrial Commission if employer disputes.

Submit promptly to avoid denial; an attorney helps navigate disputes. Track all communications[2][3].

description: Notify employer in writing, get medical proof of work link, submit claim form to state commission.
